title: Read between the lines
subtitle: Infer attitude from small clues.
overview: B1 listening and reading include implied meaning.
Use parece que, da la impresión de.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: he/she does not say it directly, but...

items.es: Parece que Ana no está muy contenta con la decisión.
items.en: It seems that Ana is not very happy with the decision.

items.es: Da la impresión de que el hablante está cansado.
items.en: It gives the impression that the speaker is tired.

items.es: No lo dice directamente, pero parece preocupado.
items.en: He does not say it directly, but he seems worried.

items.es: Se nota que la situación le importa mucho.
items.en: It is noticeable that the situation matters a lot to him/her.

items.es: Quizá necesita más tiempo para decidir.
items.en: Maybe he/she needs more time to decide.
